/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/cvm++.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvm++.dir/src/token.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvm++.dir/src/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvm++.dir/src/ast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvm++.dir/src/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvm++.dir/src/opcodes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvm++.dir/src/compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvm++.dir/src/vm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cvm++.dir/src/repl.cpp.o -o cvm++
